what: An R package for transmission cluster analysis for pathogens
title: An R package for transmission cluster analysis for pathogens
text: project involve implementation evaluation algorithms detecting transmission clusters healthcare settings using genomic data. [!WARNING] project still early stages development. information planned features, see design documentation design_docs directory. [!NOTE] package developed part BIOINF 576 – Tool Development Bioinformatics course University Michigan.

title: Cluster Genetic Context — cluster_genetic_context
text: Produces summary plots regarding genetic distances within transmission clusters.

title: Cluster Genetic Context — cluster_genetic_context
text: clusters vector named sequence IDs values indicating cluster (subtree) sequence belongs . seq2pt named vector mapping sequence IDs patient IDs. ip_seqs vector sequence IDs corresponding intake positive patients. snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates. prefix descriptor indicating clusters generated (used name figure outputs).

title: Cluster Genetic Context — cluster_genetic_context
text: matrix containing intra-cluster inter-cluster genetic distances.

title: Compare Clusters — compare_clusters
text: Compares content clusters created two different methods.

title: Compare Clusters — compare_clusters
text: clusters1 vector named sequence IDs values subtrees defining cluster. clusters2 vector named sequence IDs clusters1 values subtrees defining cluster. prefix Prefix use naming figure output files.

title: Compare Clusters — compare_clusters
text: comparison content clusters.

title: Get Transmission Clusters — get_tn_clusters_MSV_SVst_index_first
text: function identifies transmission clusters based number shared variants.

title: Get Transmission Clusters — get_tn_clusters_MSV_SVst_index_first
code: get_tn_clusters_MSV_SVst_index_first(   dna_aln,   snp_dist,   ip_seqs,   ip_pt_seqs,   seq2pt,   dates,   pars = FALSE,   tree = NULL )

title: Get Transmission Clusters — get_tn_clusters_MSV_SVst_index_first
text: dna_aln DNA object sequences interest. snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates. ip_seqs vector sequence IDs correspond intake patient sequences presumed imported. ip_pt_seqs vector sequence IDs correspond intake-positive patients. seq2pt named vector linking sequence IDs patient IDs. dates vector isolate dates named sequence IDs. pars Logical, TRUE use parsimony tree instead default neighbor joining tree. tree tree use provided instead default neighbor joining tree.

title: Get Transmission Clusters — get_tn_clusters_MSV_SVst_index_first
text: vector indicating cluster isolate belongs .

title: Get Transmission Clusters — get_tn_clusters_MSV_SVst_index_first
text: Clustering performed identify maximal clusters containing single intake-positive patient occurs cluster converts. clustering metric number shared variants, clusters can multiple intake-positive patients share identical number variants cluster members intake-positive patients occur converts. clustering also requires clusters defined least one shared variant isolates .

title: get_tn_clusters_snpthresh — get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh
text: Performs clustering isolates using hard SNP distance cutoff.

title: get_tn_clusters_snpthresh — get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh
text: dna_aln DNA object sequences interest. snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates. snp_thresh threshold defining clusters.

title: get_tn_clusters_snpthresh — get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh
text: vector indicating cluster isolate belongs .

title: Read in Sequence Alignment — read_in_seq_aln
text: function reads sequence alignment file processes sequence names.

title: Read in Sequence Alignment — read_in_seq_aln
text: aln_file character string specifying path alignment file FASTA format.

title: Read in Sequence Alignment — read_in_seq_aln
text: DNA object cleaned sequence names.

title: Read in Sequence Alignment — read_in_seq_aln
text: function performs following steps: Reads DNA sequences specified FASTA file. Cleans sequence names removing specific substrings patterns. Replaces certain sequence names predefined values. Prints cleaned sequence names. Assigns cleaned sequence names DNA object.
